# Outputs

This folder contains all outputs generated by the thesis workflows. It is organized by output type.

> 🔲 Most subfolders are currently empty — outputs will be added as thesis tasks are completed.

---

## Subfolder Guide

### `qto/` — Quantity Take-Off Results
**Generated by:** `workflows/thesis/n8n_qto_extraction.json`
**Thesis task:** Task 2 (extraction), Task 6 (QTO robustness comparison)

Contains structured QTO data extracted from IFC models:
- Element inventories (IDs, types, zones)
- Quantities (counts, lengths, areas, volumes)
- One file per IFC model processed

| File Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `[model-name]_qto_method1.csv` | QTO via DDC IfcExporter (Method 1) |
| `[model-name]_qto_method2.csv` | QTO via ifcopenshell Python script (Method 2) |
| `[model-name]_qto_comparison.json` | Spearman correlation results between Method 1 and Method 2 |

---

### `bqi/` — BIM Quality Index Scores
**Generated by:** `workflows/thesis/n8n_bqi_scoring.json`
**Thesis task:** Task 3 (BQI definition and scoring)

Contains BQI scores computed from validation results:
- Score per element
- Score per model
- Confidence label (High / Medium / Low)

| File Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `[model-name]_bqi_scores.csv` | Per-element BQI scores |
| `[model-name]_bqi_summary.json` | Model-level BQI score and confidence label |
| `fault_injection_bqi_comparison.csv` | BQI scores across all fault-injected variants (Task 5) |

---

### `reports/` — Risk Registers and PDF Reports
**Generated by:** `workflows/thesis/n8n_risk_register.json`
**Thesis task:** Task 4 (risk screening), Task 7 (final package)

Contains the final output of the thesis pipeline:
- Explainable risk registers linking risk scores to BIM data quality
- Confidence bounds from BQI
- HTML dashboards and PDF reports

| File Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `[model-name]_risk_register.csv` | Full risk register with likelihood, consequence, risk score, BQI confidence |
| `[model-name]_risk_report.html` | Interactive HTML risk report |
| `[model-name]_risk_report.pdf` | PDF version for submission |

---

## Note on File Naming

All output files follow the naming convention:
```
[original-ifc-filename]_[output-type].[extension]
Example: IFC4-Infra-Bridge_bqi_scores.csv
```
